prompt:
Translate the following to Italian:

Dear Customer,

We are writing to inform you that your subscription will be renewed automatically on April 15, 2026. The annual fee of €299 will be charged to your registered payment method.

If you wish to cancel, please do so before April 10, 2026.

Best regards,
Customer Service Team
system_prompt: You are a professional translator. Translate accurately, preserving tone, formatting, and any numbers/dates. Use formal register for business communications.
expected_output:
Gentile Cliente,

Le scriviamo per informarLa che il Suo abbonamento verrà rinnovato automaticamente il 15 aprile 2026. La quota annuale di €299 sarà addebitata sul metodo di pagamento registrato.

Se desidera annullare, La preghiamo di farlo entro il 10 aprile 2026.

Cordiali saluti,
Servizio Clienti

prompt:
Translate to German:

The system requires a minimum of 16GB RAM and 4 CPU cores. GPU acceleration is recommended for inference workloads exceeding 1000 requests per second. Ensure the CUDA toolkit version 12.0 or later is installed.
system_prompt: You are a technical translator specializing in IT and software documentation. Preserve all technical terms, version numbers, and acronyms.
expected_output: Das System erfordert mindestens 16 GB RAM und 4 CPU-Kerne. GPU-Beschleunigung wird für Inferenz-Workloads empfohlen, die 1000 Anfragen pro Sekunde überschreiten. Stellen Sie sicher, dass das CUDA Toolkit Version 12.0 oder höher installiert ist.

prompt:
Translate to Spanish:

Hey! Just wanted to let you know that the team lunch is moved to Friday. Same place, same time. Don't forget to bring your appetite! 😄
system_prompt: You are a translator. Match the tone and register of the original text. Informal text should remain informal in translation.
expected_output: ¡Hola! Solo quería avisarte de que el almuerzo del equipo se ha movido al viernes. Mismo lugar, misma hora. ¡No te olvides de traer el apetito! 😄

prompt:
Translate to Italian:

The Board of Directors hereby resolves that the annual dividend of €0.85 per share shall be distributed to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2026. Payment shall be executed no later than July 15, 2026.
system_prompt: You are a legal/financial translator. Use precise legal terminology. Maintain the formal structure of corporate communications.
expected_output: Il Consiglio di Amministrazione delibera che il dividendo annuale di €0,85 per azione sarà distribuito agli azionisti registrati alla data del 30 giugno 2026. Il pagamento sarà eseguito entro e non oltre il 15 luglio 2026.

prompt:
Translate to Italian:

It's raining cats and dogs outside. We should just stay in and call it a day.
system_prompt: You are a translator. Translate idiomatic expressions into equivalent idioms in the target language, not literally.
expected_output: Fuori piove a catinelle. Dovremmo restare dentro e chiuderla qui per oggi.

prompt:
Translate to German:

Patient presents with acute onset of chest pain radiating to the left arm, accompanied by diaphoresis and dyspnea. ECG shows ST-segment elevation in leads II, III, and aVF. Recommend immediate cardiac catheterization.
system_prompt: You are a medical translator. Use correct medical terminology in the target language. Maintain clinical precision.
expected_output: Der Patient stellt sich mit akut einsetzendem Brustschmerz vor, der in den linken Arm ausstrahlt, begleitet von Diaphorese und Dyspnoe. Das EKG zeigt ST-Strecken-Hebung in den Ableitungen II, III und aVF. Empfehlung: sofortige Herzkatheteruntersuchung.
